valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Mon 22 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: High Forth 1027 expected Forties 1032 by 0600 tomorrow. Low 450 miles west of FitzRoy 1010 moving steadily east losing its identity by same time. Low Portugal 1015 slow-moving with little change
